feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Please Don't Run
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,436Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 4

Summary: Three months after Eddie leaves their relationship out of fear of how deeply he loves Buck, Buck is still unraveling from the loss. A drunken one-night stand only makes the ache worse, because no matter who’s in his bed, nobody feels like Eddie. Haunted by memories, unable to move on, and clutching the bullet casing he kept from the day Eddie was shot, Buck finally calls the one person he can’t stop needing. -- Inspired by a song by Corbyn Besson called Don't Run

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Stop. You’re losing me.
entry.summary:
Author: larissa_f1_stories

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,309Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck wants to scream. He wants to scream and cry and beg, but he knows that nothing will change this. This situation he’s finding himself in. How did he get there? Buck doesn’t know. Except he kind of does. He’s been a coward, that’s how.For almost eight years he’s been in love with his best friend. Granted, he’s only known it’s love love for a few months, but still. He could’ve told him. Maybe it wouldn’t have changed a thing. But maybe it would have.Maybe Buck wouldn’t be crying in his car right now because Eddie decided to move to El Paso. Maybe Chris would still be in LA. And maybe, just maybe, for once in his life, Buck would’ve been good enough for someone to stay. For Eddie to stay.or: Eddie wants to move to Texas. Buck is in love with him. They're both very normal about everything.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: deathless death (let me give you my life)
entry.summary:
Author: lyingdetectives

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,141Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 21

Summary: Eddie hears the gunshot before he feels it. He’s kneeling on achy knees before the pulpit when the chapel door slams open. He only manages to twist his body around to see the visitor when he hears the familiar, earsplitting pop. It takes another second for him to realize that the bullet is lodged in his stomach, which is when the excruciating pain floods his system. A shocked, rough gasp leaves his lips before the intruder flees. He lifts a shaky hand to the source of the blistering pain and it comes away wet and red. Oh, God listened. OR Eddie makes a deal with God to stop punishing his family for his mistakes and to punish him instead. Then, Eddie gets shot.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: It Wouldn't Be So Crazy
entry.summary:
Author: FishMagee

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,499Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 20

Summary: When Chimney is questioned by the board, they question how interpersonally connected the 118 is, even mentioning the closeness of Firefighter Diaz and Firefighter Buckley. When Chim debriefs with Maddie and Hen afterwards, he's surprised to find that the board was alone in their speculating.

entry.title: your hand in my pocket
entry.summary:
Author: yeonnamdays

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,546Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 189

Summary: Everything from then on is a blur. He remembers agreeing to pick Theo up tomorrow morning, rushing to grab a notepad and pen to jot down a list of necessities to buy, and saying goodbye to the frazzled-but-grateful social worker on the phone. He’s halfway out the door, one sneaker fully on, the other barely laced up, before it hits him.  He’s taking Theo in.  Buck is going to be his biological son’s… guardian? He has to pass a couple of checks, the social worker had explained on the phone, but she’d also quickly reassured him that she’d looked into his file - and since when did he have a file - and she was sure that he would pass with flying colours.  It sounds a lot more normal than it is. Or, Buck gets a call that changes everything. Eddie helps him weather the storm.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: My advice is always ruin the friendship (Better that than regret it for all time)
entry.summary:
Author: Buddie_Girl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,174Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 314

Summary: He looked down, shocked to see Christopher’s number displayed across his screen. They had texted occasionally, but it had been over six years since they last saw each other, and since Christopher never called him, something was clearly wrong. “Chris?” “Hey Buck, I know it's been a while, and I’m sorry to be so blunt, but Dad was hurt in a fire six weeks ago and has been in a coma ever since.” The color drains from Buck’s face. “I begged them to let him fight, but they won’t listen. Grandma and Abuelo, they want to…” He doesn’t let Christopher finish, “Christopher, is your dad dead?” He braces himself for the answer. It may have been over six years, but deep down, Buck’s feelings for his former partner have never changed. “No, because they aren’t in Dad’s power of attorney, you are.” Christopher tells him, “They tried to hide his will, but when they suggested pulling the plug, the hospital contacted the fire station that Dad works at, just to verify, and his captain turned it over. They couldn’t remove life support because they need you to sign off. I need you too…” Buck doesn’t even hear the last part as he’s sucked into his own thoughts.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Year In The Life
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,616Chapters: 16/365Kudos: 48

Summary: 365 Days. 365 Moments. One year to go from best friends to husbands. I'm tackling a 365 day challenge, bringing you a year in the life of Buddie! Every day gets a new chapter on the quiet everyday little moments that slowly shift their relationship and change absolutely everything. I’ve been working on this for ages and already have the first four months completely pre written, so you can expect super consistent daily updates. If I miss a day, I'll keep it going. It will not be abandoned. But I should hit the daily targets 🤞 Most of the story stays with Buck and Eddie, but we will get a few other characters witnessing things, and scenes between Buck and Eddie and other characters. . It's going to be a year of small moments between Buck and Eddie.

entry.title: Unbroken
entry.summary:
Author: Luna_Fics

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,627Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 253

Summary: Evan Buckley was a donor baby, and when his job was done, when his brother survived, the Buckley's gave him away, leaving Evan bouncing through the foster system. Years later, he thought he had found his home, the love of his life in Liam Parks, only to realize he had traded one nightmare for another, this time suffering with isolation and abuse. Now, Evan is Buck. He works for the LAFD, and a single father fiercely protecting his daughter, Mila. Suddenly, Buck is pulled into the loud, loyal life of the 118, his dangerously attractive coworker Eddie, and a found family he never thought he was allowed to have. Just as the walls start to come down, and Buck started to feel safe. Buck's past starts catching up to him. Or, Buck had a rough childhood, and an even worse marriage full of abuse. He runs to Los Angeles with his daughter and he finds his place in the 118, and falls for his actual love of his life Eddie. He meets new people on the way that show him what love really is.

entry.title: Out In The Open
entry.summary:
Author: Buckedie

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,573Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 15

Summary: Buck and Eddie have secretly dated for months. At a building fire, Buck gets trapped when it collapses. After a tense wait, he crawls out; Eddie kisses him, revealing their relationship. Buck recovers from a concussion and back pain, and the team is fully supportive.

entry.title: The Kendall's at the 118
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 242,212Chapters: 50/?Kudos: 114

Summary: After they get rid of Gerrad the 118 is happy to welcome a new captain: Captain Kendall along with his wife Maddie who is a paramedic. However some of the 118 soon notice that things are off with Maddie and Doug's relationship. When Eddie realises that Maddie is his husband's sister it makes things even more complicated and just increases their worry for Maddie.

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,022Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 563

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: because you have to
entry.summary:
Author: avidreader0202

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 74,885Chapters: 12/13Kudos: 107

Summary: After years of chaos, Buck has finally built the life he once thought was impossible: a soulmate he gets to call his husband, three kids who are his entire universe, and a new beginning in LA that feels like hope. But just when everything settles, a diagnosis shatters the illusion of safety and forces Buck to confront the fight of his life. The fic where Buck is diagnosed with cancer and has to fight for the future he always wanted — and the family that refuses to let him face it alone.

entry.title: Chain of Command
entry.summary:
Author: fallenandinlovewithhumanity

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,429Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 23

Summary: Between medical calls that hit too close to home, Buck struggling after saying goodbye to Theo, the helplessness of not knowing where any of the migrants are, and an overheard conversation that left him with even more doubts about Detective Hooks, Eddie is fighting on more than one front. Getting separated from the 118, brings him answers but at what price?

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,114Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 139

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: kiss me and i might drop dead
entry.summary:
Author: slowclub

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,020Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 256

Summary: Buck cradles him, almost, moves Eddie’s head to rest gently in the crevice of his elbow. He doesn’t stop touching him, feather-light all over, from his cheek to his hair to his waist to his thigh and all the way back up again. Like he’s trying to fit a lifetime of love in a single movement. Like he’s finally starting to accept that this is all they’ve been allowed. Like he can see the color draining from Eddie’s face despite him just having been shocked back to life.Buck and Eddie get trapped in an elevator.

  • buddie is klaine and i'm jigsue

entry.title: it's not so impossible
entry.summary:
Author: digitalflute

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,742Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 303

Summary: When he gets to the guest bedroom — now transformed into Theo’s room — the door is slightly ajar, and Buck tiptoes forward to peek inside. The night light on the wall glows bright enough for him to see the brand new race car bed in the corner, where Theo is sprawled out across Eddie’s chest. They both appear to be fast asleep, books strewn across the floor next to them, and one of Eddie’s fingers held tight in Theo’s tiny hand.The sight make Buck’s heart ache with a tangled knot of longing. He wants… well, he wants too much. He should focus on being grateful for this: the way Theo has taken to Eddie right away, instinctively aware that he’s someone who can be trusted. He’s already built a habit of trailing after Eddie like a shadow with a look of awe on his little face that Buck finds highly relatable.And the way Eddie is with Theo — steady and kind and endlessly patient — makes Buck feel like the luckiest person in the world, just getting to be there witnessing it.Buck watches Eddie with Theo and decides maybe they should all move in together about it. It just makes logistical sense, after all.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Christopher Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Theo
  • Boy Dad Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Domestic Fluff
  • Pre-Relationship
  • Soft Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz
  • Theo Whisperer Eddie Diaz
  • Moving In Together

  • Ambiguous/Open Ending

entry.title: Certified Disaster Treasure Hunters
entry.summary:
Author: FandomWork101

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,120Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 25

Summary: The Buckley siblings have spent years obsessed with the legendary myth of The Treasure of Thieves — a centuries-old fortune believed by most people to be nothing more than a myth. But when a late-night emergency call reveals a flaw in the original treasure maps, Maddie becomes convinced the treasure was hidden in California all along. Naturally, she drags her younger brother, Evan Buckley, into the chaos. Armed with childhood maps, dusty history books, and absolutely no real plan, Buck and Maddie set off on a reckless treasure hunt across California while trying to convince everyone in their lives that they are definitely not spiraling. Between suspicious clues, bad decisions, secret-keeping, and the very real possibility of getting arrested, Buck quickly realizes that finding buried treasure might actually be the easy part. Or: Buck and Maddie revive their childhood obsession with a legendary lost treasure, lie to everyone, dump the kids with Eddie and Chimney, and go chasing buried treasure across California. What could possibly go wrong?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Maddie Buckley/Howie "Chimney" Han
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley & Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: On the Record
entry.summary:
Author: ScribblesAfterDark

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,563Chapters: 20/?Kudos: 158

Summary: Time seemed to stretch, the world narrowing into a pinpoint. There she was. Shock hit him first. She looked different. Hair scraped back in a messy bun, face pale and tired, dark circles bruising her eyes.…it all triggered memories he had tried so hard to lock away. The fight, the betrayal, the night she’d outed him…he hadn’t even let himself think about her for two years. And now, here she was, holding a baby cradled in her arms. Eddie’s breath caught. His hands slackened at his sides. The air felt thick, heavy, impossible to move through. He could barely process the sight of her, the sound of her voice, the soft whimper of the child. “Shannon?” His voice came out rough. “What…what are you doing here?” Her eyes met his, tired and full of something that looked a lot like guilt. “Hey, Eddie,” she said softly. “We need to talk.” Or, Eddie Díaz finally has everything under control…his career, his relationship…but when his past shows up on his doorstep holding a baby and a thousand unanswered questions. Between the tabloids, the team, and Buck’s new life at the 118, holding it all together might be Eddie’s toughest game yet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
